notes: SELLING_CLIMAX: Oct 10 21:00 UTC — vol=13.2× avg (strongest single-bar capitulation in dataset), close=0.0130.
Prior 48h: -52.1% dump. Classic panic selling exhaustion.
ABSORPTION: Oct 11-12, delta_flip_positive fires — taker buy ratio crosses above 0.5 while price holds near low.
BASE_FORMATION: Oct 12-14, higher lows, volume dry-up ~40-60% of climax peak.
BREAKOUT: Oct 14-17, reclaim of pre-dump range on expanding volume. +156.3% in 168h.
SUI Aug 2024 post-BTC-crash absorption reversal. +127.7% in 168h.
SELLING_CLIMAX: Aug 5 00:00-06:00 UTC — vol=3.9-8.2× avg (BTC macro crash event).
Macro-driven climax context — tests VAR in broad market sell-off vs coin-specific panic.
ALCH Feb 2025 absorption reversal. +220.7% in 168h from climax low.
SELLING_CLIMAX: Feb 21 — vol=4.4× avg, small-cap AI-sector capitulation.
Distinct period (Q1 2025), distinct sector (AI tokens) — tests cross-sector generality.
SELLING_CLIMAX: Feb 26 — vol=4.2× avg, meme-season capitulation.
Earliest case in dataset (Feb 2024) — tests temporal generality across bull cycles.

_notes: 5th pattern. Pure OHLCV + taker buy volume — no perp OI/funding required. Detects selling climax → CVD delta flip → base formation → breakout. Mechanically distinct from TRADOOR (OI-driven), FFR (funding-driven), WSR (price-action spring), WHALE (accumulation). Covers spot exchanges too.
